title: perilla frutescens var. purpurascens
intro: Perilla frutescens var. purpurascens, also known as purple perilla or Korean perilla, is a variety of the perilla frutescens plant, a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of perilla frutescens var. purpurascens include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and asthma. Perilla frutescens var. purpurascens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or oil, and is also used as a flavoring agent in traditional Korean cuisine, where it is known as "kka-nip".
